summary: Round 2 Role 1 consensus review inspected the revised remaining-gaps consensus plan and targeted evidence references. Role 1 Round 1 objections are addressed in the revised document.
decisions: The revised document includes explicit consensus protocol, direct MCP hard proof, native authority signals, behavior recall trigger ledger, and real semantic RAG/answer-quality completion gates.
next_steps: Continue Round 2 reviews for the remaining roles; only ten AGREE results in the same round can mark the plan consensus-approved.
